source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: CAIE IGCSE Accounting 0452, Version 1 Sep 2020, valid 2023-2025. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: All high-impact conclusions map to page-map references. Page references use printed/footer page numbers with documented +2 offset from physical PDF pages.

topic_tree.notes: 26 topics cover all 7 syllabus sections and 19 subtopics from p.9-15. topic_id stable and unique within skill. Scope/out_of_scope present. Explicit syllabus exclusions (partnership admission, preference shares details, folio columns, etc.) reflected in out_of_scope or generation_constraints.

assessment_model.notes: Paper 1/Paper 2 structure, AO weightings, question styles, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds, command words reference and generation_constraints all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear. Examples include advanced partnership topics and detailed IFRS application.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.
Parent topics (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) have classification_hints and common_misclassifications that overlap with subtopics; consider whether parent-level hints add distinct value or should be minimal.
Page references use printed page numbers with +2 physical offset. Machine consumers may need an explicit physical_page_offset field for automation.
Source extraction_confidence is medium (single-channel text extraction, same-agent review). Reviewer accepts this risk for validated status; independent re-review recommended before active.
